Name: DAMAGE_MOTION_WEIGHT_PARAM
Description: Defines weight thresholds used to determine damage reaction animations based on attack impact strength or target size category.

Fields.Name: Tiny
Fields.Description: Damage motion weight value for extremely small impacts.

Fields.Name: Small
Fields.Description: Damage motion weight value for small impacts.

Fields.Name: Medium
Fields.Description: Damage motion weight value for standard or medium impacts.

Fields.Name: Large
Fields.Description: Damage motion weight value for large impacts.

Fields.Name: Very Large
Fields.Description: Damage motion weight value for very large impacts.

Fields.Name: Huge
Fields.Description: Damage motion weight value for extremely large impacts.

Fields.Name: Massive
Fields.Description: Damage motion weight value for the largest possible impacts.
